tool_args.label: Queens Midtown Tunnel South Tube exhaust duct breach incident

payload.description: Incident at Queens Midtown Tunnel (QMT) where the South Tube exhaust duct was breached by a drill rig from a barge on the East River. Required full closure of tunnel. North Tube reopened around 1 pm for two-way traffic. South Tube reopened shortly after 5:30 pm after temporary repair. Permanent repair completed September 6, 2024.

TBTA's twenty-fifth joint operation for ghost plates and persistent toll evaders, held at the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge, with participation from NYPD, New York State Police, DMV, NYC Sheriff, MTA PD, Taxi and Limousine Commission Police, and Port Authority Police.

tool_args.label: Cargo vessel coordinated safe passage under Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

payload.description: Coordinated safe passage under the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge of a cargo vessel carrying four tall container cranes enroute to Port Liberty Bayonne Terminal.

tool_args.label: Toll Violation Enforcement Action Item approved

payload.description: TBTA Committee approved and moved to Board revised toll violation enforcement regulations to reduce toll violation fee to $50 at certain bridges/tunnels and establish $50 violation fee for Congestion Relief Zone.

payload.claim_text: $10 million in recurring savings will begin in 2025. This includes reducing areas of under-spending, future efficiencies in non-labor areas, and the elimination of vacancies primarily due to revised staffing requirements.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: 2024 YTD overtime 8.5% favorable from mid-year forecast

payload.claim_text: 2024 year-to-date total overtime is 8.5% ($2.2 million) favorable from the mid-year forecast. This is attributed to continued management efficiencies and improved scheduling and staff deployment.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: Toll violation fee reduced to $50 at multiple facilities

payload.claim_text: Revised regulations would reduce the toll violation fee to $50 at the Bronx-Whitestone, JFK, Throgs Neck, and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges, as well as the Queens Midtown and Hugh L. Carey Tunnels, and establish a $50 violation fee for the Congestion Relief Zone.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: TBTA anticipates another record revenue surplus in 2024

payload.claim_text: TBTA anticipates another round of record revenue surplus this year due to a combination of increased toll revenue and lower expenses.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: Summer traffic and revenue exceeding 2023 levels

payload.claim_text: Summer traffic and revenue are both exceeding 2023 levels and are anticipated to continue to do so through the end of the year.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: Flood door testing at Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels

payload.description: Flood doors installed in 2017 as part of TBTA's long-term resiliency program. MTA Construction and Development engineers and contractors, assisted by TBTA Maintenance crews, conduct overnight tests of the 20-ton doors designed to prevent water from flooding the tunnels.

tool_args.label: Peregrine falcon preservation by TBTA Maintenance

payload.claim_text: TBTA's Maintenance Department has continued for more than four decades to play a key role in the environmental success story of protecting peregrine falcons, an endangered species. Efforts include facilitating hatching and banding of peregrine falcon chicks in nest boxes atop Marine Parkway, Throgs Neck and Verrazzano-Narrows bridge towers, in partnership with NYC Department of Environmental Protection.
